title: Hydrothermal carbonization of green waste to produce biocoal, carbons and biochemicals
description: A practice abstract describing the hydrothermal carbonization process applied to green waste to produce high-quality biocoal and valuable biochemicals, highlighting process efficiencies and CO₂ avoidance potential. It outlines feedstock flexibility, production capacities, market values, and implementation challenges including gaps in the legal framework for green waste utilization.
